The '''Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaught''' was a military vessel built by [[Core Galaxy Systems]] for the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] before the time of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Enforcer-One_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|160px|[[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']] [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

Core Galaxy Systems Dreadnaughts were aimed at planetary assault and occupation and could operate in an atmosphere as well as land on a planetary surface. This type of vessel normally used its turbolasers to blast through planetary defense armadas, then enter a planet's upper atmosphere to allow its drop ships to deliver a planetary invasion force.

==History==
[[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']] was a modified Dreadnaught, and [[the Rig]] appeared to be a highly modified vessel, serving as a space station thousands of years after the [[Old Sith Wars]].

{{Ship-stub}}
